demoProducts.name: 可叠加密封收纳盒套装（6件装）
demoProducts.nameEn: HOMELODY Stackable Storage Bins with Lids, 6-Pack
demoProducts.features: BPA-free食品级PP，四侧卡扣密封，3种规格(0.5L/1.2L/2.5L)，可叠放节省40%空间，洗碗机安全，含20张标签+粉笔笔，FDA+LFGB认证
demoProducts.sampleReview: The lids seal tight and nothing has gone stale in 3 months. The labels make it look like a Pinterest board.
demoProducts.compliance: US: FDA 21 CFR + Prop 65 | EU: LFGB + EU 10/2011 + REACH

demoProducts.name: 军工级磁吸车载手机支架
demoProducts.nameEn: VICSEED Car Phone Mount, MagSafe Compatible, 360° Rotation
demoProducts.features: N52钕磁铁6磁阵列1500g吸力，三合一安装(吸盘/粘贴/出风口)，单手操作，360°球关节+180°臂旋转，耐温-40°C~80°C，兼容4-7寸手机
demoProducts.sampleReview: Survived a full summer in Texas heat — suction never fell off the windshield. The magnetic pull is surprisingly strong even with a thick case.
demoProducts.compliance: US: FCC Part 15(含电子元件时) | EU: CE + RoHS | SEA: SNI(印尼)/SIRIM(马来)

demoProducts.nameEn: Portable Bluetooth Speaker IP67, 90dB, 12H Playtime, XBass
demoProducts.features: IP67防水防尘(1m/30min)，2×5W全频喇叭+被动振膜，XBass DSP低频增强9dB，12h续航，蓝牙5.3/33ft，USB-C快充，自行车绑带，TWS双机配对
demoProducts.sampleReview: Survived submersion twice accidentally on a kayaking trip. Sound quality at this size is borderline unreasonable — the bass hits.
demoProducts.compliance: US: FCC Part 15(强制) + UL 62368-1 | EU: CE RED + RoHS + WEEE | SEA: IMDA(新加坡)/NBTC(泰国)/SIRIM(马来)

demoProducts.sampleReview: Readings match my Fluke 115 within 0.5%. For a third of the price, this is the obvious choice for home/hobbyist use.
